lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there friend.

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Oh..what am I to do, Christmas is ruined.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Christmas is ruined, my bakery is ruined, everything is ruined!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe this has something to do with Santa in Varrock Square.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there friend.

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Adventurer! You've come at the right time. I need your help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could this have something to do with some missing Gingerbread Gnomes?

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: How did you know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Santa told me to sort it out for him, he said his son has taken over the Gingerbread Gnome production.

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: He has been an absolute disaster, he suddenly showed up and took control of our bakery. We tried to stop him, but he locked up the two other bakers!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you manage to escape?

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Well... I don't think he knows how Gingerbread Gnomes are made, he brought in an Icelord to ice the gingerbread.

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: I threw a stone at it to cause a distraction, giving me a chance to escape. After I got out, I heard Jack lock the entrance behind me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He brought in an Icelord!? I don't know how to deal with one of those.

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: It's terrifying! I think Jack must have a few screws loose to think that was a good idea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I better tell Santa, since I can't get into the bakery from here....

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Please hurry, we need to restart production as soon as possible.

sections.title: Talking to the Worried Baker before going back to Santa

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Have you managed to free the other bakers and stop Jack Frost yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet, I'm still working on it.

lines.speaker: Worried Baker
lines.text: Hurry we need to get back into production, before it's too late.
